name: Savory Chicken with Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the chicken and place it in a bowl with the marinade ingredients.
2. Blanch the bamboo shoots in boiling water for 30 seconds to remove any off-flavors.
3. Mix all sauce ingredients in a small bowl.
4. Heat a wok, add 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, and stir-fry pine nuts until golden brown. Set aside on paper towel.
5. In the same wok, heat again and add 2 tablespoons vegetable oil. Stir-fry garlic for 10 seconds.
6. Add chicken with marinade to the wok and stir-fry until the chicken is white but not completely cooked through.
7. Add the sauce, bamboo shoots, and green onions. Cook for 2 minutes.
8. Mix well and serve.
